name: golang-github-tink-crypto-tink-go-dev
title: golang-github-tink-crypto-tink-go-dev
description:
crypto library Tink in Go (library)
Tink provides secure APIs that are easy to use correctly and hard(er) to
misuse. It reduces common crypto pitfalls with user-centered design,
careful implementation and code reviews, and extensive testing. At
Google, Tink is one of the standard crypto libraries, and has been
deployed in hundreds of products and systems.
.
To get a quick overview of Tink's design please take a look at Tink's
goals: https://developers.google.com/tink/design/goals_of_tink
.
The official documentation is available at:
https://developers.google.com/tink
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-tink-crypto-tink-go-dev because crypto library Tink in Go (library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-tink-crypto-tink-go-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-tink-crypto-tink-go-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-tink-crypto-tink-go-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
